segments.text: You can't imagine how a mother who has so many beautiful children, sees them in such
joyous mood with their families and the children nicely settled down.
It's very satisfying to see you all so much enjoying complete oneness
One has to realize only one thing, that though you are many still compared with the population
of this world we have very few who really know true knowledge.
The real Knowledge!
You all people who are knowledgeable no doubt but also knowledge which is not being
Adorned with truth or which is not the true knowledge has no meaning
All that vanishes into thin air because it is artificial
by your Kundalini awakening
You all have achieved
That state where we can say you know
You, Know what Is The real Knowledge Is
But think of the people who do Not know What Knowledge Is
We Take
For example, we say that our knowledge is nothing but love.
But one should understand the discrimination – The Knowledge which is Love within you
it's just emitting out from your being!
You don't have to assert or think and read some sort of poetry
or go into some romantic mood, just pure love which emits and this is the knowledge also.
How you have to relate it in this way? The knowledges that we've got about yourself
is evident, is absolutely expressed on your finger-tips and about others also.
You know about other's
And About Yourself
This the greatest subtle knowledge you have
No one knows like that
Apart from you people no one knows
About themselves or about Others
So this Knowledge that has come to you
which is extremely subtle, extremely secretive absolutely secret if you know about somebody
You Know others do not know that you know about them and so this knowledge
That we have got Is nothing but love it's very difficult to make
knowledge and love put together because our idea of knowledge is very different.
What we read from the books, how can you learn it?
what love means are attachments to us in ignorance we get attached people children family things
By getting attachment, it is proved that we do not have the knowledge.
If you had knowledges then all attachments should just drop out and
You would become a global personality
A drop in ocean
For example
We are attached to many things like
Like our family
Something happens with the family
And get very disturbed
They can't bear
If anything happens to our children, we think horrible.
It's just the whole world is falling on you."
Then from family
You move along
and are attached your friends
To neighbors
We're also attached
Your country
Attachment
To your country
Is not knowledge
Once
Are a realized soul
Just start seeing
Your country clearly
What wrong it has got
what ignorance it has got, in what darkness it exists and
In What way It is quarrelling fighting for rights and things
But with the knowledge that you have within yourself
You see so clearly
What Is The problem of your country?
Then you try to improve That
Through Your love
Means, the power of your knowledge is love.
If you have all that knowledg within and if just sitting at home and meditating it
has no meaning what we are to go about tell people?
You need meet other peoples friends or family in another relations about your knowledge
If you cannot go do that, then your knowledge is not with love.
It's such a connection between the two –
You feel like telling everybody
That we've got your Realization
We're feeling everyone
That you are a realized soul
But in fact
Feel as if you were expressing your ego
Alright?
By some other way
Some others methods
You can express to them that you have the true knowledge.
When we've got false-knowledge,
then one gets ego and thinks he knows so much
about these things like the colour of the carpets
all those shades everything
any stupid thing if they think it's very great
That is a sign of stupidity in your head also
that you think this is very great to know.
Now we have discovered, through all kinds of acquiring knowledge in the whole world what
There are wars going on, there's all kinds of destructions coming in.
I saw it the television this George is a whirlwind which was going around and he killing
so many people, destroying too much people without understanding what He doing but
He's there and he is acting very well.
So, it that doesn't understand or isn' tthat he understands?
And that his doing something just to correct people this also we should have full idea
like yesterday when I came here was raining heavily then i sat down suddenly stopped
Stop till the whole program was over, till I spoke it wasn't working.
But suddenly when you started clapping also we started clapping that's what is was
so even nature knows who You are but you must know The Nature this
This is the point.
Nature will act according to what your level of spirituality, surprisingly I always felt
that there cannot be levels for spirituality .I felt once you get realization , but later
on discovered i was wrong it's not so even after getting realization people had so many

So one had to work out on different chakras and different nadis somehow or other make

The other day that we should not react is human nature to react so absolutely human
but if she have become super-human he would not react by not reacting will grow definitely
grow But If You React Then You Cannot Grow Because
Because you are working under the pressure of other things that is not yourself.
Now supposing as I said, see these carpets and know this color etc., then I react to

I will not have any sense of judgment if i react to it, but If don't react then
ill know whether these carpets have got vibrations or are they emitting
vibrations. Now what is this vibration? That's the love so
The communication like that you can see things when you see
The light is there and the light gives you perception, gives your vision to see things.
In a same way when we are enlightened what happens that these vibrations start flowing
just like this light?
And in those lights can be seen good or bad but sometimes put the same parameters
as human beings do
Like you go to some house, very nice house or a good house all these things make me happy.
But actually what about that house?
Is it having good vibrations of its bad vibration is worth living there are not

i felt the vibrations of that place. I said did you go and see

its was all burning then they found out
there were santology there for years together
That's not a place where
can live You have to have a very pure
even heart of poor man
could be better than

I said my God what sort of vibrations this lady has felt about?
So In your judgment there is no pure knowledge so how connected they are, vibrations which

and they

What Love Is

Say mother I think

they'll come and say, Mother no I won't have anything to do with that person.
Why?

Person through your vibrations now see how connected it is like we can say The Sun

So what is the difference or we can say, The Moon and the moonlight.
What's that different?
There no differences in these two things one is moon another is light so all this

But sometimes even if they're missing just to justify yourself you will say that

Is around us but

Once
Once we start understanding that vibrations of pure knowledge are from a very different
age, then you're not attached to the person.
You aren't attached with family or country – nothing!
But what do feel is the pure vibration coming through?
This point which was very confusing when I say my vibrations were good and I like
those vibrations and while you jump into the ocean of filth.
Many people have asked Me, Mother why is it sometimes we make mistakes?
You do not makes mistake its your ignorance which darkness that's by whenever you plunge
in to fall into trouble so understand our knowledge has be completely clear like
In our house, supposing we have a lamp and it's dirty – you cannot get the light.
The same way if your heart is not clean especially in out hearts then we start doing things
believing that its right by which hurt yourself or others
It's a very, very common error in human nature to identify wrong things as right and just
make themselves look such great – such divine thing.
As I told you now there are people who want say divide the country simple reason they
Now they want to divide, because the few people who want their importance will instigate others
and tell them all right we must have freedom.
If you've got this country for ourselves then can develop our self or a part of
country which is richer, better off they will think that it's alright we'll have all
the money to ourselves and everything.
So then divide in name of religion or prosperity whatever but if you divide a country actually
you are facing a big problem, because we have seen that wherever people divide they fall
into kind of dark-dark dungeon from where the cannot come out. It's just few
peoples whose ego is their want to some land as there own but they die not only
That all that idea, that we'll have this possession of the land goes away.
So in same way you can see on smaller things also and small thing's are very much identified
– if I had these things then everything will be fine!
You cannot understand how people just jump at it or say oh Mother This is ours,
This is ours. We must do this for ourselves
Openly, they don't think it's wrong to say that
It says my country I must do from a country and another says of them
This Is My Country I Must Do For My Country
As long as there is this my and i
That means There is no knowledge
The Knowledge
as I told you, pure knowledge is that which gives a pure light. Pure Light means pure
vibrations – now vibrations can be misleading or could mean the quantity of vibrations
being less and more but it's another way to see for yourself why do we want
do a particular thing.
Mental also you can use, parameter of mental understanding – why I want to it?
What is the gain for all people if we start thinking from that angle what will be gained
by others and what they'll gain with this or should I do it…
You'd be amazed!
We get real picture about your doing so must keep yourself all time in state where
witness yourself, you see your self that why am I doing this?
What is the purpose.
Sometimes it could be some conditioning or a psychological thing but if start watching
carefully then you will be amazed and your vibrations itself will tell on your fingertips
But sometimes the vibrations are so superficially coming, ah I've got the vibrations and this
am that.
For these reasons –I'm saying again an'again though you're such a nice family
of mine-and we all are so much blessed & have knowledge with us–we should be very
wise!
If there is no wisdom… if it's not wisdom then we can never understand what
we are doing. Now to develop this wisdom, what have you
do? See every time if I say anything they'll come otherwise
Mother how did We get the wisdom? What is
a way of getting the Wisdom? Wisdom You
already have within You. Shri Ganesha
Is Already there who gives You the
Wisdom but You must take to Shri Ganesh
There i find people become so much addicted
to Shri Ganesha that they lose his identity completely.
They become very slavish about the whole thing and just believe, oh!
. .they are spiritual, great all these false ideas are no good does your Ganesa gives

Now you must count how many wise things have we done so far.
Where did You take a very wise decision?
Have We been wise to do something or
are We just doing it because
Your identified with the particular type of life,
A particular time of answer
So wisdom is thing that gives You first of all complete peace
If your wisdom has developed then
then you become very peaceful because whatever people may say,
what ever they do ,whatever aggression
They make to. Whatever it is your peaceful and
You see the stupidity of other person
Of their nations
And understand why this
Wisdom is such an important thing in human being
Because animals don't have so much wisdom as we
Have sometimes of course sometimes
We are even less than animals
But still by experience, you see we have to learn that
We've been making mistakes. So many mistakes
You committed so far now are going to commit more
Mistakes or Are Going To be wise?
Wisdom is not apparent outside
You can't say somebody is wise
By looking at the person but in vibrations
you will know that the person is extremely wise. He may speak, he might not speak – if

things. The other day I met one lady whose son was very sick
And she took him to the hospital
doctors gave them all kind of medicines
and he became even worse
Then She telephones me
Mother
I don't know what happened, I went to the doctor and doctors gave him this-and that
treatment.
And a child has become sick."
But why didn't you ask Me before?
Why did You go into hospital first?"
Lack of wisdom!
"'I am there.'
Why do not You asked me?'
We had one case here in Kabila where was One Child who fell down & broke His arm.
Now, the mother didn't show any wisdom.
She took her child to hospital and doctor said tomorrow we are going operate here put
some artificial arm inside but father was sensible he say all right today I will take
this child at home He brought that child in night about 3 o'clock
I said, all right.
And put it right next day when he took me to the hospital and doctor said but now there

what?
They would ask the doctor do something once the doctors start doing some thing
There's lots of miracles which have taken place about Sahaja Yoga, I must say and in

One day…

And they were telephoned there so i found out their phone number
and asked if ...I said is a child alright?
So leader there was surprised because
But that boy had fallen in the water and was in the water for quite some time.
And he has all filled with water, even his brain is full of water as usual there were

So I just say don't worry nobody told me don' t worry the boy would be alright

So they were surprised how I said so firstly

Said he'll be all right
And you are alright it's perfect all-right
So this they will surprise at my knowing about it
Okay

Here I will say, It Is pure knowledge.

Always dealing with your and how i know this
That the attention of mine is global
So anything happens to any upsetting takes place
Any deviation take places
My attention is there and immediately I know. There's something wrong somewhere

Which makes it
Life better

Attention but these attention

What I've done ? Did you see our chakras ? Did You find out what went wrong ? No

music everything but
But Do You Leave Everything To The Param Chaitanyas
This Is the second point in wisdom
Do you have wisdom to leave everything to Param Chaitanya?
After experiencing also, like there was one lady who is going in the car and she found

And She didn't know what do now that the brake are not no more how will She manage

And all the cars were moving very fast and she didn't know what to do.
So She put Her head on the steering wheel, and She said I leave it to Paramchaitanya

so by saying that What happened?
And she said, Mother I don't know.
When I raised my head, I found My car was taken on one side of the road and nobody
uh..was there.
All cars were passing by but somehow or other this car
Was taking them very nicely with some force
So the wisdom lies in understanding
The working of Param Chaitanya
How it guides you?
how It helps You
how it preserves you, how depending on Paramchaitanya
You can continue to be living very happily.

They live for long they don't die
and if ask their experiences is really amazing
How? It works out
If they want or do not like also
They can pass, but if they want to live, Param Chaitanya takes over and you can live long.
But living along doesn't mean that go on bothering yourself as what will do with

How would be the source all these nonsensical things worries come through alright then

Whatever has to have been will happen
But Param Chaitanya can interfere in case we leave it to Param Chaitanya
He said many a times live into God
Leave It To God
but God means
Don't know what they mean by god
God means Paramchaitanya, God is divine force that's working everything.
So another way of looking at it the wisdom we should understand each and every particle
in this world created by Divine, by the Divine Force
And this particle, everything is completely under the guidance and supervision of Paramchaitanya.
Nothing can move unless until Paramachaitanya works on it!
It's something so connected globally – there are so much that people don't realize what
they're doing or should have done I mean many scales you find something happening
Like supposing something is happening now in America, just try to find out what America

Immigrant will get the answer so also it takes full care of persons who believe in

But they can make mistakes and create problems but you leave them to Paramchaitanya.
It's so remarkable that in my own life I've seen all of a time it works for
me!
I was building a house in Pune and we had to put a slab, very big slab needed about
three hundred bags of cement for that.
So i got the cement so they said start early morning you can finish next morning twenty-four
hours.
I said, all right.
So at about five o'clock i told let's go the work is over.
He says how do you know?
I say no lets just go and sit so imagine which was going to finish after twelve hours
it already finished with workers who were walking around and everybody said Mother
its a miracle!
How can such big slab be laid in such short time ? I said to make them understand
It must be Hanuman, I have done the job.
But all these people are part and parcel of that Paramchaitanya.
Now you're worshipping your mother – to worship her is a biggest thing because
All these deities and everybody are her children under Her command, under Her desire.
So to worship the Mother they story of as you know about Ganesha that The mother said
That one who goes around the Mother Earth three times I will give him a present so
Ganesha thought in his wisdom, who is greater than my mother?
No one else because he knew that He cannot compete with a brother
Who has got a peacock
For the conveyance. So how can I go around
And win over this person
The best thing to take to wisdom
My Mother Is greater then everything else
So he went round his mother three times and got the prize.
And their other brother was just still moving on, when they came back found that present
is already lost so again I'll say it's a wisdom to leave everything to Paramchaita
And this is something for a modern person very difficult to understand.
He can't calculate 2 plus two, he's so bad because of these computers and things like that
it absolutely hopeless as far any mathematical calculations are needed or
Now I am, I must say
I don't know how to handle any computer or any calculator, but if you ask Me just
like that Mother How much will it be?
And say so and It'll Be That.
But i am sure about it cannot anything else but that and it works that way sometimes
of course If want tell some wrong thing Just to mislead the person then I may say
But normally I know it is that, but not like the way we do.
So, I am not saying that you develop your knowledge to the extent where it can be done.
But if we start using our wisdom then it will always come handy – in anything which
you do think of the wisdom!
My advice is as a mother who loves all people and cares for those who haven't got Realization
You should also try to create more people for Sahaja Yoga, but in that if you start
behaving a manner all the time saying,"You are catching this.
Your a Bhoot!
We're these or those."
I never said like anyone so we shouldn't say it as there is no love and understanding
The understanding was just same with the person who was and now you were knowledgeable
So, you must use your knowledge to correct that person not put him down.
And the correction is also not verbal it's just through vibrations and you can correct
other persons.
Most of Sahaja Yoga work sometimes I have seen that stops because we are very methodical
become like great teachers start telling them stories then they get fed up so when
people as I said, we have to spread the knowledge very important.
We cannot keep it ourselves but is not for any ambition or leadership of any kind recognition

bound to You because they find that true knowledge. But supposing somebody comes
for you says I know this true knowledge? You might knowing but i have what do you

Just smile see?
That is what they think…

Is part and parcel of your being
It just within it

Of concrete stuff
You have read or understood

A light within

Not necessary!
Is how your heart is clean in the heart resides.
Imagine all other knowledge resides inside of brain while pure knowledge resides within

there are seven auras around your heart which control brain in such manner as to act on

Within You she is settled down as many things –you know the shlokas which says-that She

We have to become paripakva means absolutely, absolutely matured till
you're mature this mother herself put's
You in the illusion and plays around so that
So one should understand she is playing
around with you and try to be very careful as not falling into her Maya because if she

So this power of Brhanti is also important – delusion or a thing by which She creates

So this stupidity and all that can be removed by the Brhanti she creates . And this power

straight forward so it has to go round around till there reach point to understand
that it was the play of Mother that brought them to this shore
Of wisdom. So for us, It is important
To see
That so much has been done
By Paramchaitanya For Us
The Mother Has Done
SO MUCH FOR US
Now what are we going
TO DO
OURSELVES
TO GET ALL THESE POWERS THAT SHE HAS GIVEN US
TO BE COMPLETELY ENLIGHTENED AND DEVELOPED
What have we done so far, nothing to be done as such but
develop a kind of deep devotion. Deep understanding and that depth is possible
absolutely possible because now you are on your way

depend on Paramchaitanya.
That's very important, also there' s habit of many people who put their blame

You are caught up yourself only!
All such ideas of no use – face your self find out about it and you have to perfect

I don't know, two thousand years according to them would be something great but i don
